site.title: Peel Sept — the week, curated by hand
site.description: Seven songs a week, selected and rated by hand. No algorithms, no bubbles.
hero.lede: Seven songs, selected and rated every week. A listening diary, updated on Sundays. No algorithms, no bubbles.
sections.albumsCaption: Seven albums to hear front to back. When sources agree, the square gets a subtle highlight.
player.title: Listen to this edition
player.copy: The player loads only after you click. Before that, no requests to Spotify.
player.loadAria: Load the Spotify player for this edition
share.tweetText: Peel Sept — {week}: seven songs curated by hand.
share.nativeText: Seven songs a week, selected by hand. {week}.
footer.manifesto: The name nods to John Peel — human taste before the algorithm. We peel back the internet to get to the pulp: seven songs a week, chosen by hand.
